sentence: 他们的意识形态差异很大。
pinyin: Tāmen de yìshi xíngtài chāyì hěn dà.

meaning: 1. to talk with sb (face to face); 2. discussion; 3. talk; 4. chat
sentence: 两位教授今天进行了公开对谈。
pinyin: Liǎng wèi jiàoshòu jīntiān jìnxíngle gōngkāi duìtán.
english: Two professors held a public discussion today.

sentence: 她说找对象不一定要多金，性格好才重要。
pinyin: Tā shuō zhǎo duìxiàng bù yīdìng yào duō jīn, xìnggé hǎo cái zhòngyào.
english: She said a partner doesn't have to be wealthy — a good personality is what matters.

meaning: lit. to hang up a plate; to open up for business; listed (on stock mar
sentence: 新开的诊所今天正式挂牌营业了。
pinyin: Xīn kāi de zhěnsuǒ jīntiān zhèngshì guà pái yíngyè le.
english: The newly opened clinic officially opened for business today.

meaning: place (in numbered sequence); degree on employment scale
sentence: 这次考试他的位次比上学期提高了不少。
pinyin: Zhè cì kǎoshì tā de wèi cì bǐ shàng xuéqī tígāo le bù shǎo.
english: His ranking in this exam improved quite a bit compared to last semester.
